---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Cam Smithers"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

-   Team Box Scores (2020 to 2025)

<!-- -->

-   Player Box Scores (Use rbind)

-   Best Player Metrics

    -   Team Season Stats (Regular & Post)

    -   Player Season Stats (Regular & Post)

```{r}
team_box_scores <- readRDS(
    '/Users/camsmithers/Desktop/Camalytics/NBA/Data-NBA/team_box_scores_updated.rds')
player_box_scores <- readRDS(
    '/Users/camsmithers/Desktop/Camalytics/NBA/Data-NBA/Current/full_box_player_updated.rds')
```
